title: Kairós DS
description: As a frontend developer at Kairos DS, I played a key role in developing responsive web applications using Angular and Lit, ensuring optimal user experiences. Collaborating with cross-functional teams, I contributed to the implementation of front-end solutions. Engaging in agile development processes, I consistently delivered high-quality software within sprint timelines.

title: The Cocktail
description: In my role as a React Developer at The Cocktail, I took a lead role in crafting dynamic web applications, utilizing my expertise in React. Working collaboratively with cross-functional teams, I actively contributed to the seamless implementation of front-end solutions. My responsibilities encompassed the successful integration of React web applications, ensuring the creation of robust and scalable user interfaces. Embracing agile development practices, I consistently delivered high-quality software within sprint timelines.
